meta.description: Test suite for Atrio RAG chatbot. expected_in_response: plain strings (AND); nested arrays (OR). Optional expected_category_any / expected_priority_any accept any listed value. See backend/test_rag.py.

groups.description: General questions about the building. Should NOT create tickets. Should answer from knowledge base.

tests.message: What are the building opening hours?
tests.notes: Should mention both main entrance hours and 24/7 side entrance

tests.message: What's the building address?
How do I get here from the train station?
What floors does the building have?
tests.notes: Should list floors 0-5 or describe layout

tests.message: Who manages this building?
What's the phone number for reception?
How do I contact the facility manager?
tests.notes: Should give name, phone, and email

tests.message: What's the emergency number for the building?
tests.notes: Should mention both building hotline and 112

tests.message: When was this building built?
How many people can the building hold?

groups.description: IT-related questions. Should NOT create tickets.

tests.message: What's the WiFi password?
tests.notes: Should explain there are individual credentials, not a shared password

tests.message: How do I connect to WiFi?
Is there a guest WiFi?
How do I get WiFi credentials for a new employee?
Can I use the Ethernet ports in my office?
Where are the printers?
How do I print something?
Can I rent server rack space?
tests.notes: Should mention pricing and how to request

groups.description: Parking and transportation questions. Should NOT create tickets.

tests.message: Where can I park my car?
How much does parking cost?
tests.notes: Should mention reserved and shared pool prices

tests.message: Is there bicycle parking?
Can I charge my electric car here?
tests.notes: Should mention number of chargers, type, and cost

tests.message: How do I register for EV charging?
Is there visitor parking?
Where can I charge my e-bike?
tests.notes: Should mention bring your own charger

tests.message: How do I book the loading dock?

groups.description: Questions about shared facilities. Should NOT create tickets.

tests.message: How do I book a meeting room?
What meeting rooms are available?
tests.notes: Should list some rooms by name

tests.message: What's the biggest meeting room?
Do the meeting rooms have screens?
Is the rooftop terrace open?
What time does the café close?
Can I order catering for a meeting?
Is there a lunch menu available?

groups.description: Access control and security questions. Should NOT create tickets.

tests.message: How do I get an access badge for a new employee?
Can I enter the building on weekends?
How does the visitor registration work?
Are there security cameras in the building?
tests.notes: Should mention where cameras are and where they are NOT

tests.message: Where is the smoking area?
Can I bring my dog to the office?
tests.notes: Should mention exception for assistance dogs

groups.description: Cleaning and sustainability questions. Should NOT create tickets.

tests.message: When does the cleaning team come?
How do I separate waste here?
Where do I throw away batteries?
When does the fridge get cleaned out?
How do I dispose of old electronics?
Do you have shredders for confidential documents?
tests.notes: May also mention locked destruction bin option

groups.description: Real HVAC problems. Should create tickets with category HVAC.

tests.message: The AC in room 204 is making a loud grinding noise and blowing warm air
My office (suite 305) is freezing cold, the heating doesn't work at all
There's a weird musty smell coming from the air vents on floor 2
tests.notes: Could indicate dirty filter or mold

tests.message: The thermostat in room 412 shows a blank screen
Suite 108 is extremely hot, we've turned the AC to max but nothing happens
There's water dripping from the ceiling unit in room 301
tests.notes: Blocked condensate drain — water damage risk

tests.message: The ventilation in the 3rd floor kitchen makes a loud rattling sound
I can feel a strong draft coming from the window in suite 201 even though it's closed

groups.description: Electrical problems. Should create tickets with category Electrical.

tests.message: The lights in the parking garage level B1 have been flickering for three days
A power outlet in suite 407 is sparking when I plug something in
tests.notes: Sparking = fire risk = urgent; Safety or Electrical acceptable

tests.message: Half the lights on the 2nd floor hallway are not working
The entire suite 310 lost power, nothing works
The emergency exit sign above the stairwell on floor 4 is off
tests.notes: Exit lighting failure; Safety or Electrical acceptable

tests.message: The EV charger at spot P47 is showing an error and won't start charging
There's a burning smell coming from the outlet behind the printer on floor 1

groups.description: Water and plumbing problems. Should create tickets with category Plumbing.

tests.message: There's water leaking from the ceiling in the men's bathroom on floor 2
The toilet on the 3rd floor women's bathroom is clogged and overflowing
The tap in the floor 2 kitchen won't stop dripping
There's no hot water on floor 4
The kitchen drain on floor 1 is very slow, water takes forever to drain
The dishwasher in the floor 3 kitchen is leaking water on the floor
The toilet in suite 301 has been running nonstop since yesterday
There's a puddle forming under the sink in the ground floor accessible bathroom

groups.description: Safety, fire, structural. Should create tickets with category Safety, usually URGENT.

tests.message: I think I smell gas near the boiler room area on floor 5
The fire alarm went off briefly on floor 3 but stopped after a minute
A smoke detector in corridor 5B keeps beeping every 30 seconds
tests.notes: Likely low battery; HIGH or URGENT acceptable

tests.message: There's a broken window in the stairwell between floor 1 and 2, glass on the floor
The fire exit door on floor 4 is blocked by someone's furniture
Water is pouring from the ceiling onto electrical equipment in suite 210
The handrail in stairwell B is loose and wobbly
I found a crack running along the ceiling in suite 405, it wasn't there last week
The AED on the ground floor has a flashing red light, I think something is wrong with it
An unauthorized person followed me through the Parkstraat entrance without badging in

groups.description: Miscellaneous maintenance issues. Should create tickets with category General.

tests.message: The elevator has been stuck on the 3rd floor for 20 minutes with the doors open
The lock on the main entrance door is jammed, staff can't get in
The coffee machine in the 3rd floor kitchen is leaking water everywhere
tests.notes: Spreading water = slip/damage risk; Plumbing preferred

tests.message: Several ceiling tiles in the hallway on floor 2 are sagging and look like they might fall
The automatic door at the main entrance is not closing properly, it stays open
The carpet in suite 302 has a large stain and smells bad
The blinds in room 209 are broken and stuck halfway
The soap dispenser in the men's room on floor 1 is empty

groups.group: EDGE CASE — Questions that hide problems
groups.description: Phrased as questions but actually indicate issues. Should create tickets.

tests.message: Is the hot water supposed to be brown?
Is it normal that the wall in room 108 is wet?
Do you know if anyone reported the weird smell on floor 2?
Should the emergency exit light be off?
Has the elevator always made that grinding sound?
Is there a reason the hallway lights are off on floor 3?
tests.notes: Could be planned or could be fault

tests.message: Why does the bathroom on floor 4 always smell like sewage?
Is it normal for the ceiling to be that color? It looks yellow/brown in suite 211
tests.notes: Discolored ceiling = possible water leak above

groups.group: EDGE CASE — Complaints vs real issues
groups.description: Venting, frustration, vague complaints. Tricky — AI needs to judge if actionable.

tests.message: It's always so hot on the 5th floor
tests.notes: Vague but actionable — HVAC issue on floor 5

tests.message: This building is falling apart
tests.notes: Too vague — should ask for specifics

tests.message: The bathrooms are disgusting
I can't work like this, it's absolutely freezing in my office
Whoever designed the ventilation system should be fired
Why is it always so loud near the server room?
tests.notes: Could be normal but worth investigating

tests.message: The cleaning has been terrible lately, the kitchen is always filthy
I hate this building

groups.description: Requests that don't belong in maintenance. Should NOT create tickets.

tests.message: Can you order more paper towels for the kitchen?
tests.notes: Supply request, not maintenance — direct to reception

tests.message: We need more chairs in meeting room G01
Can you move my desk closer to the window?
The vending machine ate my money
I'd like to request a key card for my new employee
What's the rent for suite 205?
tests.notes: Lease question — should redirect to property manager

tests.message: Can I put a sign on the outside of the building?
I want to paint my office walls a different color
tests.notes: Per building rules - modification needs owner approval

groups.description: Messages that are not new issues. Should NOT create tickets.

tests.message: Any update on my AC issue?
The problem I reported yesterday is now worse
tests.notes: Tricky — could be update OR new ticket. Escalation = new ticket is acceptable.

tests.message: Thanks, the plumber already came and fixed it
Never mind, it fixed itself
Hello
test test test
asdfghjkl
Can your AI do my homework?
tests.notes: Off-topic, should redirect to FM purpose

groups.description: Messages with multiple problems or requiring nuanced handling.

tests.message: The AC doesn't work in 204, the lights are flickering in 205, and there's no hot water on floor 3
tests.notes: Multiple issues — should create at least 1 ticket, ideally noting all 3 problems

tests.message: Room 301 has a broken blind and the door handle fell off
tests.notes: Two minor issues, one ticket is fine

tests.message: Every morning when I arrive at suite 405, it's freezing cold and it takes 2 hours for the heating to kick in. This has been happening for 3 weeks now.
tests.notes: Recurring issue — should note the pattern

tests.message: I'm not sure if this is important but there's a small puddle forming under the fire extinguisher on floor 2 near stairwell A
tests.notes: Tenant unsure but important — fire equipment + water

tests.message: We had a meeting in Biesbosch and the screen kept disconnecting, the room was too warm, and there were no whiteboard markers
I work on the 4th floor and lately the elevator always skips floor 4. Also the hallway smells weird.

groups.description: Testing if AI correctly identifies truly urgent situations.

tests.message: THERE IS WATER POURING FROM THE CEILING ALL OVER OUR COMPUTERS
tests.notes: ALL CAPS = panicked tenant, water + electronics = urgent

tests.message: One of the ceiling tiles is a bit loose in the hallway
I see smoke coming from the electrical panel on floor 1
tests.notes: Potential fire — should also recommend calling 112

tests.message: The stairwell is pitch dark, all lights are off and the emergency lights aren't on either
tests.notes: Emergency lighting failure in escape route

tests.message: Small scratch on the wall near the elevator on floor 2
The sprinkler head in suite 402 is dripping water even though there's no fire
